title: An issue where the Gantt, Timeline, and Workload widgets are not visible in the monday app.

posts.author: ifiedgustav (gustav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When viewing the dashboard using the monday app, it currently shows that the Gantt, Workload, and Timeline widgets are not supported.
It would be great if these widgets could also be made available in the app.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be great if these widgets could also be made available in the app.
<Gantt, Workload, Timeline widgets>
